company.name: Start to Scale Financial Management
company.geography: Netherlands primary; international touchpoints via prior WPP/EMI/Warner Music network

positioning.essence: Senior CFO leadership that turns gut-feel finance into the structure a scale-up actually needs.
positioning.positioning: The senior finance partner that takes a growing SME from kladje-on-the-back-of-the-envelope to a fully professional finance function — diagnosis, roadmap, hands-on implementation, and ongoing operation.
positioning.tagline_nl_hero: Van chaos naar controle. Van onderbuik naar inzicht. Van start-up naar serieuze scale-up.
differentiators: ~30 years of senior finance leadership — CFO at Hill & Knowlton (WPP's global communications firm), with earlier roles at EMI Music Netherlands and Warner Music Benelux
Network of finance professionals on call for execution depth
Hands-on operator — not just advisory; runs the finance function until permanent hires take over
Backed by Duke Strategies (silent partners providing strategic counsel and reach)

audience.primary: Owners, founders, and boards of NL-based scale-ups (€1M–€20M revenue, growing fast, finance still informal)
audience.secondary: PE-backed portfolio companies needing interim CFO leadership during transitions
painPoints: Finance grew organically — no structure, no rhythm, no forecast
Owner makes capital and cash decisions on gut feel
Need a CFO but can't yet justify the hire

services.name: Finance Diagnosis
services.summary: Two-week deep read of current finance function. Quantified gap report. Roadmap to a professional finance function.

services.name: Roadmap Implementation
services.summary: Hands-on installation of the diagnosed structure: chart of accounts, monthly close, KPI dashboard, cash forecast, board reporting cadence.

services.name: Fractional CFO
services.summary: Ongoing CFO-level leadership at 1–3 days per week. Board prep, capital decisions, investor communication, finance team mentoring.

services.name: Interim CFO
services.summary: Full-time CFO seat during transitions: fundraise, M&A, founder transition, finance leadership vacancy.

approach.name: Diagnose
approach.summary: Read the books, the board pack, the cap table, and the conversations. Name what's actually broken — in plain Dutch.

approach.name: Roadmap
approach.summary: Sequenced 12-month plan from current state to professional finance function. Costed, dated, with owner per workstream.

approach.name: Build
approach.summary: Install the structure: monthly close, cash forecast, KPI dashboard, board cadence. Train the team that owns it after.

approach.name: Operate
approach.summary: Run as fractional or interim CFO while the structure beds in. Hand over to a permanent CFO when scale demands it.

founder.name: Wilgert Hart
founder.title: Managing Partner
founder.bio_short: Wilgert Hart spent the better part of two decades as CFO inside Hill & Knowlton (WPP's global communications firm) — CFO Netherlands and CFO Europe & Netherlands — with earlier finance roles at EMI Music Netherlands and Warner Music Benelux. Nearly 30 years of finance leadership inside professional-services and media businesses that were always scaling, restructuring, or being integrated. Now bringing that operator's lens to NL scale-ups.
founder.headline: Senior Finance Professional / CFO / FD

duke_strategies.contribution: Strategic counsel, network access, brand and operational infrastructure

metadata._note: TBC fields filled from Wilgert's LinkedIn profile on 2026-06-02 (experience, education, expertise, linkedin). linkedin URL slug should be confirmed against his actual vanity URL. Remaining TBC: legalForm (set at registration), calendar (booking link). Empty TBC strings are intentional placeholders, not data quality issues.
